## Title: Replace magic number bitmask with symbolic constant in EPS Mobile Identity parsing

### Summary
The EPS Mobile Identity decoding and encoding functions used the hard-coded bitmask `0x7` to extract the 3-bit identity type field from NAS message buffers. This magic number appeared in five locations across the codebase without documentation, making the code's intent unclear and maintenance error-prone. The value `0x7` corresponds to the lower three bits of the first octet that encode whet
